# Plans — status board

**This page is auto-generated — it cannot go stale.** Both boards are projected by
`scripts/check_plans.py` from each plan's frontmatter (`status:` + optional `priority:`).
Never hand-maintain status/priority here; edit the plan's frontmatter and regenerate:
`python3 scripts/check_plans.py`.
